name: Bag of Many Beans
description: Spends one use of the Bag of Many Beans, rolls on the d8 RollTable, and posts the result to chat. Requires the item and its named RollTable to exist.

name: Chrono Casket
description: Captures a dead or unconscious (0 HP) Medium-or-smaller target into the Chrono Casket, removing their token and storing their data on the item. Running again while loaded releases the creature near the holder with a 24-hour cooldown.

name: Blitz Barrier — Awaken Shield
description: Opens a dialog to declare Hit Dice spent (applied manually by the player). Sets shield charges to 1 + HD spent for 1 minute. Posts a half-cover reminder to chat. No automatic HD deduction.

name: Blitz Barrier — Toggle Light
description: Toggles the token's light between off and 15ft bright / 30ft dim white light. Posts ignite/extinguish message to chat.

name: Blitz Barrier — Blinding Blitz
description: Spends 1 shield charge, rolls 3d6 radiant damage (halved on passed DC 15 CON save). Posts result to chat. Blinded condition, reaction tracking, and end-of-turn repeat saves are NOT automated — apply manually.

name: Nature Spirits
description: Circle of the Shepherd: summon a Bear, Hawk, or Unicorn spirit as a tile with a 30ft aura. Applies midi-qol ActiveEffects to allied tokens in range. Move or dismiss with the same button. Requires Druid level 2+. Uses Portal for placement if available, falls back to dnd5e AbilityTemplate.

name: Heavenly Harmony
description: Master control for the Heavenly Harmony performance system. Start/switch/end Pieces, make Rhythm Checks (1d20 + CHA vs DC 10+2×nextLevel), and view current piece state. Performance level and state persisted as actor flags. All piece effects applied manually.

name: Hope Tracker
description: Opens a styled dialog showing current Hope orbs. Buttons: Gain 1, Lose 1, Spend 2 (+1d4), Spend 3 (+1d6), Spend 3 (reroll d20). All actions post to chat and re-read live item state. Requires the Hope item to use spent/max tracking mode.
